label: Distance to primary road
definition: Distance in meters to the nearest TIGER/Line primary road (S1100). (Result column: dist_pri.)

label: Distance to primary/secondary road
definition: Distance in meters to the nearest TIGER/Line primary or secondary road. (Result column: dist_prisec.)

label: Distance to secondary road
definition: Distance in meters to the nearest TIGER/Line secondary road (S1200). (Result column: dist_sec.)
